title: Umami Creamy Argentinian Tofu Stir-fry
description: A cozy vegan-friendly dish featuring an umami-rich creamy tofu stir-fry using vegetable stock cube and air-fried for a satisfying texture.

ingredients.name: Water or Vegan Milk to Thin Sauce
ingredients.notes: Adjust as needed for desired consistency

instructions: Drain and pat dry the tofu with paper towels. Slice into thin pieces.
Mix all ingredients except nutritional yeast and water in a large bowl. Add sliced tofu, gently toss to combine.
Pour mixture into prepared air fryer basket. Cook for 15-20 minutes until golden brown.
Reduce heat to 160°C (320°F) and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until thickened slightly.
Add sliced tomatoes and balsamic vinegar, stir gently and let simmer for another minute. Remove from heat.
Garnish with nutritional yeast if desired before serving.
